examples: This machine is composed by three parts: automatic paper feeding tectorial pre-coating film and cutting recycle.
The tectorial filter material is a new kind of filter material and it makes up the defects of the traditional filter materials in the process of flue dust treatment.
The tectorial membrane part is arranged partially at the circumferential direction of the stent body, and the end part of one side of the tectorial membrane is provided with a protrudent marker.
